title: Silent Valkyrie
body:
# Welcome To

![Full Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d31e822e29c9cdf0cf5057cb1720a701dd3e9a59.png)

## A Mod that Adds New Ores, Mobs, And a New Dimension to the Game!

### Regalia, The Pluto God:

![Text Seen Above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db6f97943f25c3ad4bb5917cd5945d0da20dbf32.png)

### New Portal to a New Dimension:

![Text Seen Above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0fad02f93e6c24884605beeeed289e0192d79a7.png)

## And SO MUCH MORE!!!






Now Available in:

1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, & 1.20.1!


![BisectHosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/68c442d3-90b2-4f71-b0e9-263fc392d7c4.png)

*There is currently a rework in progress for 1.20.1*
